releaseNotes:
Streaming reliability release.

Fixes:
- Provider calls now use SSE streaming for OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic endpoints, enabling token-by-token live assistant previews
- Agent mode shows a live assistant draft while model text arrives instead of waiting for a full final reload
- Long agent runs can produce a final step-budget summary instead of stopping with only a paused status
- Agent step budget is expanded for complex tasks and resume capacity is increased
- Tool approval dialogs now show a read-only formatted argument preview instead of an empty-looking input box
- Added regression tests for streaming providers and step-budget finalization
